main.description: Extended metadata for an organization actor. Complements the base actor profile with organization-specific fields like legal structure, contact info, and reference links.

organizationType.description: Legal or operational structure of the organization (e.g. 'nonprofit', 'ngo', 'government', 'social-enterprise', 'cooperative').

urls.description: Additional reference URLs (social media profiles, contact pages, donation links, etc.).

context.description: Free-form additional context about the organization.

location.description: A strong reference to the location where the organization is based. The record referenced must conform with the lexicon app.certified.location.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
